title: Horse breeding in mountain areas

Key activities: horse breeding, horse feed production, horse training, activities with public, agrotourism. Key actors: horse owners, land owners, horse breeding experts, fieldworkrs, public Positive impact on local and regional SES is employment and pasture land maintenance in mountain areas.

title: Mountain landscape and reference chains
description: The reference mountain chain of this VC is Slovak Carpathians. The reference mountain landscape of this VC is Polichno. The village lies in the shallow valley of a small river. Marble is mined in a small part of the municipality area. The unfavorable demographic development of the village caused that several buildings are empty. However, a development of cottages in the village is appearing, which is determined by its good location (17 km) from Lučenec city and presence of a natural landscape.

title: Interest on this VC
description: Horse breeding in the mountains contributes to the maintenance of pasture land and is associated with society's activities. Farms offer horses for walks in the surrounding landscapes, and some horses have their owner. The farms' offer includes horse walks for riders with different levels of experience, carriage, and sleigh rides. Farms also offer some accommodation, horse driving courses, and horse training. Some farms focus on endangered species of horse breeds supported by European funds, try to be self-sufficient in feed, and organize exhibitions and horse races. Horse breeding is an expanding activity in Slovakia.

title: Challenges
description: 1) imported horses demanded by Slovak customers 2) work with horses is demanding in time and physical strain. 3) The qualification of breeders is problematic. Knowledge transfer from generation to generation has been interrupted during the last decades. This is reflected in the level of horse breeding, horse training, and the quality of work with horses. Overall the type of challenge faced by this VC is Current. This VC is classified as Traditional and Innovative.

title: Innovation
description: The type of innovation of this VC (Value Chain) is Exogenous. Innovation is in reaction ot the current trend of horse breeding. Horse breeding existed in the past and now it is reintroduced again but with adaptation to current sosietal demand. The innovation is related to New products. The land use systems involved are Grassland and Forestry. The local assets include Natural and social.
